settings.tagline: Weatherproof. Reflective. A coat they'll actually wear.

settings.title: About This Coat
settings.value_3: Reflective trim on back and chest
settings.value_4: D-ring opening on back for leash attachment over coat
settings.value_5: Velcro belly strap + secure neck snap

settings.title: Coat Size Guide
settings.hint: Measure back length (collar to base of tail) and chest girth (widest point).

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Wash & Care
settings.content: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Do not tumble dry — hang or lay flat to dry. Reapply DWR spray after 10+ washes to maintain water resistance.

settings.title: Harness & Lead Use
settings.content: This coat has a reinforced D-ring opening in the back. You can attach a standard leash clip directly through the opening without removing the coat. Compatible with all standard back-clip harnesses.

settings.name: Comfortable Fit
settings.description: Adjustable velcro belly strap and neck snap ensure a secure, comfortable fit without restricting movement.

settings.name: Leash Access
settings.description: D-ring opening in the back panel — clip your lead directly through the coat.

settings.name: Easy to Put On
settings.description: Step-in or over-the-head designs with simple velcro closure. On in seconds, off just as fast.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
